title: Author canonical SKILL source + per-client config
description: Single source of truth for the fabric-init SKILL across Claude and Codex. New templates/skill-source/fabric-init/SOURCE.md is the canonical body (~86+ lines) — authored at parity with the current Claude SKILL (3-phase initialization interview, framework confirmation, rule generation, agents.meta.json update). Codex 27-line version is rebuilt from this source. clients.json declares per-client frontmatter (Claude has allowed-tools, Codex doesn't) and outputName UNIFIED to fabric-init for both clients (Q5 user override). Cursor consumes both directories automatically (D15) — no Cursor-specific source.
scope: Layer 0 infrastructure — SKILL canonical source enabling derivation pipeline (TASK-004) and parity content (TASK-033)

files.change: NEW: canonical SKILL body (~100 lines) covering Precondition / Phase 1 framework / Phase 2 architecture / Phase 3 rule generation / output contract; protected tokens documented; client-agnostic prose
NEW: { claude: { outputName: 'fabric-init', frontmatter: { name, description, 'allowed-tools' } }, codex: { outputName: 'fabric-init', frontmatter: { name, description } } }

criteria: SOURCE.md content has parity with current claude-skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md depth (3-phase structure preserved)
clients.json schema-validated; outputName for both clients is fabric-init (NOT agents-md-init)
Frontmatter overrides correctly distinguish Claude (allowed-tools present) from Codex (no allowed-tools)
Canonical source documents all protected tokens (AGENTS.md, FABRIC.md, .fabric/agents.meta.json, etc.)
